events.text: File created successfully at: /app/answer.json (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`. Most likely fault: a stuck/failed outdoor air temperature sensor (false low-temp signal) or a welded W2 aux-heat relay in the control sequence, either of which locks aux heat on continuously instead of normal balance-point staging with the compressor. Marked `fail` (unsafe/non-compliant continuous operation) with medium risk, pending sensor/relay verification and replacement.
